title: Décor Double Wall Stainless Steel Travel Mug - Keeps 4 Hours Hot - 12 Hours Cold - Car Cup Holder Compatible - Removable Screw Top Lid - 200ml Mint.
features: COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT THERMAL FLASK - Mini thermal flask perfect for a quick coffee on the go, keeping milk cold and juice for the kids
SIP IN STYLE – This coffee travel mug combines a sleek design with its gloss finish making it the perfect companion for enjoying your favourite hot or cold drinks on the go.
EXCELLENT TEMPERATURE RETENTION – Whether you prefer iced coffee or hot tea, the double wall insulated design on these travel mugs keeps drinks cold for up to 12 hours or hot for up to 4 hours.
KEEPS DRINKS HOT FOR 4 HOURS - For superior thermal performance deisgned to keep your Coffee, Tea, Herbal Teas, Hot Chocolate, Milk with that perfectly fresh made taste.
REUSABLE – Made from high-quality, food-grade 304 stainless steel, this travel mug is built for everyday use making it a great alternative for those looking to reduce waste and avoid single-use cups.
